emails.subject: Bankruptcy post-id's
emails.body: Bankruptcy post-id's I started calculating the bankruptcy book last night for the credit group. This needs to be done nightly. I may be out a few days so if I am can someone else take this over from me please? We can also use these to check daily for counterparties that have been moved incorrectly. The file is in O:\erms\1intra\west\Bankruptcy post-ids.xls Thanks KK

emails.subject: RE: Bankruptcy post-id's
emails.body: RE: Bankruptcy post-id's I will do it Wed and Thursday. Kam and I will be out Friday, can someone else do it then? We are supposed to email the post-id's to Debbie Bracket correct? PL
